name: KPET Ultra Paceline Corp
business: KPET Ultra Paceline Corp is a blank check company newly incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has not selected any business combination target and has not initiated any substantive discussions with any potential target. The company has no current operations or revenues.
